  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BackBotton
    Back to Main Menu button for returning from game or dialogs.
    BaseBlockPane
    Base class for all block types in the game.
    BaseMenuButton
    Base class for all menu buttons in the game.
    BedRockPane
    Represents a Bedrock block in the game world.
    BlockMapLogic
    Manages the game world map and block data.
    BlockMapLogicTest
     
    CobbleStonePane
    Represents a Cobblestone block in the game world.
    DebugText
    Display text component for debug information.
    DiamondOrePane
    Represents a Diamond Ore block in the game world.
    DifficultyButton
    Difficulty selector button for the main menu.
    DirtBlockPane
    Represents a Dirt block in the game world.
    DogPane
    Represents the Dog (objective) block in the game world.
    GameCommandPane
    Command input panel for debug commands during gameplay.
    GameDebugPane
    Debug information display panel for the game.
    GamePane
    Main game view pane containing the game world visualization and debug/command overlays.
    GamePaneTest
     
    GoldOrePane
    Represents a Gold Ore block in the game world.
    GrassBlockPane
    Represents a Grass block in the game world.
    IronOrePane
    Represents an Iron Ore block in the game world.
    LavaPane
    Represents a Lava block in the game world.
    LeafPane
    Represents a Leaf/Leaves block in the game world.
    Main
    Main entry point for the TailFinder game application.
    MainMenuPane
    Main menu screen for the TailFinder game.
    MakeSoundAble
    Interface for objects that can produce sound effects.
    MenuButtonVbox
    Vertical box container for main menu buttons.
    Passable
    Marker interface for blocks that are passable/walkable.
    PassableTest
     
    QuitButton
    Quit button for exiting the application.
    Refreshable
    Interface for components that support refresh/update of their display.
    RefreshableTest
     
    SlimeAILogic
    Implements AI logic for Slime enemies in the game.
    SlimeAILogicTest
     
    SlimePane
    Represents a Slime enemy block in the game world.
    SoundLogic
    Utility class for playing sound effects.
    StartGameButton
    Start Game button for the main menu.
    StevePane
    Represents the player character block in the game.
    SteveWalkLogic
    Manages player character (Steve) movement, collision detection, and physics.
    SteveWalkLogicTest
     
    StonePane
    Represents a Stone block in the game world.
    VisibleGridBlock
    Renders the visible game world grid using JavaFX GridPane.
    VisibleGridBlockTest
     
    VisibleGridSteve
    Renders the player character (Steve) in the center of the screen.
    VoidBlockPane
    Represents empty/void space in the game world.
    WinLossAlertPane
    Alert dialog displayed when the player wins or loses the game.
    WoodLogPane
    Represents a Wood Log block in the game world.
    WorldThread
    Manages the game world thread and main game loop.
    WorldThreadTest
